---
title: "About This Site"
---

::: {.page-header}
# About This Site

This page is kept as a fallback from the original Quarto template. The main project page is now [Project](project.qmd).
:::

This portfolio was redesigned from the default starter website into a presentable Quarto site with a homepage, project page, data visualisation page, hobbies page, and GenAI reflection page.
